caminos.title: Caminos
caminos.empty: No caminos yet. Be the first to create one!
caminos.meta_description: Discover and explore pilgrimage routes from around the world.
caminos.error_loading: Failed to load caminos. Please try again.
caminos.delete_dialog_body: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
caminos.delete_dialog_error: Failed to delete the camino. Please try again.

caminos_new.title: Create New Camino
caminos_new.meta_description: Create a new camino and contribute to the pilgrimage community.
caminos_new.access_denied: You do not have permission to access this page. The pilgrim role is required.
caminos_new.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
caminos_new.error_conflict: A camino with this name already exists. Please choose a different name.

camino_detail.meta_description: View the full details of this pilgrimage route.
camino_detail.error_loading: Failed to load camino. Please try again.
camino_detail.inline_save_error: Failed to save changes. Reverted to previous value.
camino_detail.no_stages: This camino has no stages yet. Add at least two waypoints to generate stages.
camino_detail.error_loading_stages: Failed to load stages. Please try again.

caminos_update.title: Update Camino
caminos_update.error_generic: Failed to update camino. Please try again.
caminos_update.error_conflict: A camino with this name already exists. Please choose a different name.
caminos_update.error_forbidden: You are not authorized to edit this camino.
caminos_update.error_loading: Failed to load camino data for editing.
caminos_update.reorder_warning_body: {count, plural, one {1 stage has} other {# stages have}} distance or description data that will no longer appear in this Camino after saving. The data is not deleted — it will return if you restore the original order.

stage_detail.meta_description: View the details of stage {number} of this pilgrimage route.
stage_detail.error_loading: Failed to load stage. Please try again.

stage_edit.title: Edit Stage {number}
stage_edit.meta_description: Edit the distance and description of this stage.
stage_edit.field_distance_hint: Optional. Enter the distance in kilometres.
stage_edit.access_denied: You do not have permission to edit stages. The pilgrim or owner role is required.
stage_edit.error_generic: Failed to save changes. Please try again.
stage_edit.error_forbidden: You are not authorized to edit this stage.
stage_edit.error_loading: Failed to load stage data for editing.

auth_error.heading: Login session expired
auth_error.message: Your login session has expired or is no longer valid. Please try logging in again.
